title: ぐつぐつメラメラの熱いヤツ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, I spot Bamboo Memory on the track
heading toward Oguri Cap who appears to be
taking a break.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, Bamboo. Sure, no problem.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So, uh, do ya like it hot? Like, how do ya say it...
All bubbling and fiery!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: (Is she talking about spicy hot pots?)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Thought so! I like it too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Oguri! Let's have a heated showdown
sometime!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
(A showdown? Are those really that hot? Well, I'll
be fine with the heat either way.)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Forget about sometime—we can have one right
now.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Whoa! You really are in a different league!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But if we're gonna have a showdown, I want it to
be in the proper place! Okay, later!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
A "proper place"? Maybe Bamboo prefers
high-class restaurants?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well, eating some hot pot with her sounds
enticing no matter where. Hehe, I can't wait.
